description_long: This is a freestanding wooden shelving unit with a rectangular frame and three open horizontal shelves, each supported by dark horizontal rails. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a natural and warm appearance. The sides are solid panels, and the back is open, allowing for easy access to the shelves from the front. The base consists of two sturdy feet that provide stability. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for storing books, magazines, or other items in an urban environment such as a sidewalk, park, or public waiting area. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, emphasizing its open-access utility.
description: A freestanding wooden shelving unit with three open shelves and visible wood grain, supported by sturdy feet and dark horizontal rails.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves with dark rails and the full width of the unit.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel and the depth of the shelving unit.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, showing the open shelves and wood grain pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the solid wood panel and depth.
